name: tasklist-workspace
description: A local-first desktop workspace for kanban tasks, timers, and JSON backups.
author: TaskList

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:electron: tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json && wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:4000/api/health && electron .
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend && tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage --publish never
